completed: Phase 1: Project scaffold (pyproject.toml, hatch, venv, src layout)
Phase 1: Configuration management (AutotaskConfig, env vars, base64 secret, auth headers)
Phase 1: Exception hierarchy (5 exception types: Auth, RateLimit, NotFound, Validation, API)
Phase 1: Core HTTP client (zone discovery with URL validation, auth headers, retry, semaphore(3))
Phase 2: Rate limiter extracted to own module (progressive throttling 50%/75%)
Phase 2: Automatic pagination via query_all() with id > last_id strategy
Phase 2: Query filter builder — Django-like Q(field__op=value) with UDF support
Phase 2: Security hardening (zone URL allowlist, cache permissions, error body truncation, pagination guard)
Phase 3: 10 Pydantic entity models with auto-registration (Ticket, Project, Task, Company, Resource, TimeEntry, ProjectNote, TaskNote, TicketNote)
Phase 3: AutotaskModel base with extra=allow round-tripping, for_create/for_update serialization
Phase 3: EntityManager — typed CRUD for known models, raw dict for ~200 generic entities
Phase 3: Child entity parent path resolution (Task→Project, Notes→parent entity)
next_steps: Phase 4: CLI wrapper (Click commands for daily-driver operations)
Phase 5: docs/ knowledge base (API reference for Claude Code)
Phase 6: Integration tests with real API credentials
notes: 70 tests passing, ruff lint clean, mypy clean
